title: Multi-Page Lease Agreement with Addenda
input:
RESIDENTIAL LEASE AGREEMENT

Property: 1247 Elm Street, Unit 4B, Berkeley, CA 94708
Landlord: Oakridge Properties LLC (Trustee: Richard Tanaka)
Tenant: Alexandra "Alex" Moreau
Lease Term: September 1, 2026 through August 31, 2028

RENT:
  Base rent: $2,850/month
  Rent due: 1st of each month
  Late fee: 5% after 5-day grace period
  Accepted payments: Bank transfer, certified check

SECURITY DEPOSIT:
  Amount: $5,700 (two months' rent)
  Held at: Bay Area Trust Company, Account #T-44912
  Return within 21 days of vacancy

UTILITIES:
  Included in rent: Water, garbage, landscaping
  Tenant responsible: Electricity, gas, internet, renter's insurance
  Electric provider preferred: PG&E
  Internet minimum speed: 100 Mbps

PETS:
  Cats: 1 cat allowed. $500 non-refundable pet deposit. $75/month pet rent.
  Dogs: Not permitted. No exceptions without 3-party landlord/board approval.
  Breed restrictions: None for cats. Weight limit 15 lbs for cats.
  Pet agreement required at move-in.

PARKING:
  One assigned space #12 in the underground garage.
  Additional visitor parking: guest spaces only, 4-hour limit.
  EV charging available in spaces #10-#14 (premium $45/month).
  Tenant may lease additional space for $125/month.

MAINTENANCE:
  Landlord handles: structural, plumbing, electrical, HVAC
  Tenant handles: light bulb replacement, AC filter changes quarterly
  Emergency maintenance: 24/7 hotline (888-555-0199)
  Response SLA: 24 hours for emergency, 72 hours for routine
  Tenant must report: water leaks within 4 hours

RULES:
  Quiet hours: 10 PM – 7 AM weekdays, 11 PM – 8 AM weekends
  No subletting without 30-day written consent
  Short-term rentals (Airbnb) prohibited — max 14 consecutive nights
  Renovations require written approval; no permanent alterations

ADDENDUM A — RENTER'S INSURANCE:
  Minimum coverage: $100,000 personal property, $300,000 liability
  Provider must be licensed in California
  Landlord to be listed as additional insured

ADDENDUM B — BUILDING AMENITIES:
  Rooftop terrace (shared), bike storage, package room
  Gym access via Oakridge Fitness member portal
  Mailroom and 24/7 lobby concierge

Signed: _____________ (Landlord)      _____________ (Tenant)
Date: July 15, 2026

building_amenities: Gym access via Oakridge Fitness member portal
